2604.17319.title: E2E-GMNER: End-to-End Generative Grounded Multimodal Named Entity Recognition
2604.17319.paper_summary: Grounded Multimodal Named Entity Recognition (GMNER) aims to jointly identify named entity mentions in text, predict their semantic types, and ground each entity to a corresponding visual region in an associated image. Existing approaches predominantly adopt pipeline-based architectures that decouple textual entity recognition and visual grounding, leading to error accumulation and suboptimal joint optimization. In this paper, we propose E2E-GMNER, a fully end-to-end generative framework that unifies entity recognition, semantic typing, visual grounding, and implicit knowledge reasoning within a single multimodal large language model. We formulate GMNER as an instruction-tuned conditional generation task and incorporate chain-of-thought reasoning to enable the model to adaptively determine when visual evidence or background knowledge is informative, reducing reliance on noisy cues. To further address the instability of generative bounding box prediction, we introduce Gaussian Risk-Aware Box Perturbation (GRBP), which replaces hard box supervision with probabilistically perturbed soft targets to improve robustness against annotation noise and discretization errors. Extensive experiments on the Twitter-GMNER and Twitter-FMNERG benchmarks demonstrate that E2E-GMNER achieves highly competitive performance compared with state of the art methods, validating the effectiveness of unified end-to-end optimization and noise-aware grounding supervision. Code is available at:https://github.com/Finch-coder/E2E-GMNER
2604.17319.paper_summary_zh: 基於圖像的多模態命名實體識別（GMNER）旨在共同識別文本中的命名實體提及，預測其語義類型，並將每個實體與相關圖像中的相應視覺區域對應起來。現有的方法主要採用管道式架構，將文本實體識別和視覺定位解耦，導致錯誤累積和次優的聯合優化。在本文中，我們提出了E2E-GMNER，一個完全端到端的生成框架，將實體識別、語義類型、視覺定位和隱式知識推理統一於單一的多模態大型語言模型中。我們將GMNER公式化為一個指令調整的條件生成任務，並納入思維鏈推理，使模型能夠自適應地判斷何時視覺證據或背景知識是有用的，從而減少對噪音線索的依賴。為了進一步解決生成邊界框預測的不穩定性，我們引入了高斯風險感知框擾動（GRBP），它用概率擾動的軟目標替代硬框監督，以提高對標註噪音和離散化錯誤的魯棒性。在Twitter-GMNER和Twitter-FMNERG基準上的廣泛實驗表明，E2E-GMNER與最先進的方法相比，達到了高度競爭的性能，驗證了統一端到端優化和噪聲感知定位監督的有效性。代碼可在以下網址獲得：https://github.com/Finch-coder/E2E-GMNER
2604.17319.author: Meng Zhang et.al.
2604.17319.authors: Meng Zhang, Jinzhong Ning, Xiaolong Wu, Hongfei Lin, Yijia Zhang
